comment: v2 — adds escalate_to_human (specialist previously could not escalate; only the coordinator had this tool).

tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Pull the full ticket record. Call this first.

tools.name: lookup_customer_by_email
tools.description: Resolve submitter email to customer_id and basic info.

tools.name: check_sso_config
tools.description: USE WHEN the ticket reports SSO/SAML failure. Returns IdP settings, certificate status, last successful auth, error state.

tools.name: check_audit_log
tools.description: USE WHEN you need to verify a recent workspace event (plan change, permission change, user removal). Filterable by event_type and after-date.

tools.name: get_workspace_account_summary
tools.description: Workspace summary: seats used/limit, admins, SSO status, created date.

tools.name: list_workspace_users
tools.description: List users with role and last-login. Optional role filter.

tools.name: modify_permissions
tools.description: Change a user's role. Requires admin confirmation for downgrades.

tools.name: reset_2fa
tools.description: Clear a user's 2FA enrollment so they can re-enroll.

tools.name: escalate_to_human
tools.description: USE WHEN the requested action is outside your tools (e.g. session revocation, legal/compliance review, payment-related work, anything you cannot complete with the tools above). Hand off with a summary of what you verified + what is blocking + what action is needed.
